title: ee.context.bead_affinity.v1
description: Bead-aware retrieval-bias summary emitted by ee context --explain --json (and ee why --json) when an --bead-id argument scopes pack ranking. Each memory in the candidate pool receives a small additive bias clamped to [-maxBiasMagnitude, +maxBiasMagnitude] (default 0.05, matching ee.context.agent_profile.v1) when its tags/content/links overlap with the supplied bead's labels, title tokens, or link graph. The block is purely explanatory: agents may use it to understand why ranking changed under --bead-id without mutating retrieval logic. Filed by bd-2942u (swarmx.barp: bead-aware retrieval prioritization).

beadId.description: The bead ID supplied via --bead-id; verbatim, never hashed.

beadTitle.description: Snapshot of the bead title at retrieval time. Optional; absent if the linter could not load the bead description.

beadLabels.description: Sorted unique label list extracted from the bead at retrieval time.

beadGeneration.description: Local .beads/issues.jsonl generation observed when the bias was computed. Pairs with workspaceGeneration in determinismKey for byte-stable replay.

matchedFeatureCount.description: Total count of (memory, feature) match signals that produced a non-zero bias contribution. 0 implies coldStart=true.

biasMagnitudeMax.description: Maximum |bias| applied across all memories in the candidate pool for this query (saturates at maxBiasMagnitude).

maxBiasMagnitude.description: Hard cap on per-memory bias magnitude. Matches ee.context.agent_profile.v1.maxBiasMagnitude for compositionally consistent behavior.

memoryBiasApplied.description: Count of memories whose final ranking score was modified by a non-zero bead_affinity_score.

coldStart.description: True when the supplied bead has no matching memories under any of the feature dimensions (tags, title tokens, link graph). When true, no bias is applied and the degraded[] block records bead_affinity_cold_start.

halfLifeDays.description: Optional recency half-life for label-derived signals. null implies no decay (purely structural match).

featureWeights.description: Per-feature relative weights summing to <= 1.0 that combine into the final bead_affinity_score. Exposed for determinism replay and tuning analysis.

basePackHash.description: Pack hash that would have been produced without bead_affinity. Lets callers prove the bias was applied on top of the canonical pack.

topBiases.description: Top-N highest-|bias| memories for operator inspection. Length-capped to keep response size bounded.

examples.beadTitle: swarmx.barp: bead-aware retrieval prioritization for ee context and ee search

degraded.message: No bead labels, title tokens, or link relationships matched the candidate memory pool.
degraded.repair: Run without --bead-id or add bead-linked evidence before expecting a ranking bias.
